{{nihongo|'''Shihahime Shrine (Shibahime, Kurihara City)'''|志波姫神社（栗原市志波姫）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shihahime Shrine (Shibahime, Kurihara City)'''|志波姫神社（栗原市志波姫）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shihahime Shrine (Shibahime, Kurihara City)'''|志波姫神社（栗原市志波姫）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Shihahime Shrine (Shibahime, Kurihara City)'''|志波姫神社（栗原市志波姫）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mutsu Province]].
